hero_subtitle: SFTY connects compliance data and audit evidence into one operational view to support bank risk questionnaires, streamline documentation, and improve executive oversight.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Bank due diligence stalls with unclear evidence
problem_description: Executives and risk teams struggle to provide consistent, audit-ready responses when compliance data remains dispersed across multiple tools. This fragmentation complicates bank risk questionnaires and slows documentation workflows, reducing confidence in regulatory and audit readiness.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects compliance data, provider outputs, case evidence and risk workflows into a unified operating layer so banks can respond to risk questionnaires with consistent, traceable and defensible documentation.
workflow_title: From onboarding checks to bank approvals
workflow_description: SFTY organizes onboarding and due diligence checks into structured reviews, decision logs, evidence packages and audit-ready documentation for bank risk responses.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Not another dashboard. Executive risk visibility
why_sfty_description: SFTY provides banks a connected compliance layer that turns fragmented risk data into audit-ready evidence and clear decision workflows for bank due diligence.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports banks with structured provider orchestration, audit-ready evidence preservation and scalable deployment to strengthen risk questionnaire responses and due diligence workflows.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for bank compliance executives?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides bank executives a connected view to manage digital asset compliance, reduce manual workload, and strengthen audit trails for risk control and bank due diligence processes.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support bank risk questionnaires?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures compliance data, case records and evidence to efficiently generate responses and documentation for bank risk questionnaires and due diligence requests.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and supporting evidence, supporting audit-ready traceability for bank reviews, regulator inspections and due diligence processes.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects existing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one operational compliance layer without disrupting current tools.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC and KYB providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace providers but integrates their outputs into structured workflows, enabling consistent compliance decisions and comprehensive audit documentation.
final_title: Centralize bank due diligence with SFTY
final_description: Review how SFTY structures compliance data and audit evidence to support bank risk questionnaires and executive risk oversight.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
